hooks.command: echo '[Hook] Note: Consider running dev server in background or separate terminal' >&2

PreToolUse.description: Reminder before git push to review changes

hooks.command: echo '[Hook] Note: Creating documentation file. Consider if README.md would be more appropriate.' >&2

node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const i=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=i.tool_input?.command||'';if(/gh pr create/.test(cmd)){const out=i.tool_output?.output||'';const m=out.match(/https:\/\/github.com\/[^/]+\/[^/]+\/pull\/\d+/);if(m){console.error('[Hook] PR created: '+m[0])}}console.log(d)})"

PostToolUse.description: Log PR URL after PR creation

hooks.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs');let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const i=JSON.parse(d);const p=i.tool_input?.file_path;if(p&&fs.existsSync(p)){const c=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8');const lines=c.split('\n');const matches=[];lines.forEach((l,idx)=>{if(/^\s*print\(/.test(l)&&!/# noqa/.test(l))matches.push((idx+1)+': '+l.trim())});if(matches.length){console.error('[Hook] WARNING: print() found in '+p);matches.slice(0,5).forEach(m=>console.error(m));console.error('[Hook] Consider using logging instead')}}console.log(d)})"

PostToolUse.description: Warn about print() statements in Python files

hooks.command: node -e "const{execSync}=require('child_process');const fs=require('fs');let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{execSync('git rev-parse --git-dir',{stdio:'pipe'})}catch{console.log(d);process.exit(0)}try{const files=execSync('git diff --name-only HEAD',{encoding:'utf8',stdio:['pipe','pipe','pipe']}).split('\n').filter(f=>/\.py$/.test(f)&&fs.existsSync(f));let hasPrint=false;for(const f of files){if(fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8').match(/^\s*print\(/m)){console.error('[Hook] WARNING: print() found in '+f);hasPrint=true}}if(hasPrint)console.error('[Hook] Consider using logging instead of print()')}catch(e){}console.log(d)})"

Stop.description: Check for print() in modified Python files after each response
